title: Login returns 500 when JWT secret is missing
expected_behavior: Login endpoint should return 400 Bad Request with a clear error message when JWT_SECRET is not configured, not a 500 Internal Server Error.
observed_behavior: Login endpoint throws unhandled exception and returns 500 when JWT_SECRET env var is absent.
reproduction_steps: Observe 500 response with stack trace in logs
deployment_impact: Blocks production deployment. Preview deployments may fail silently if env not configured.
regression_coverage: Add unit test: login fails gracefully when JWT_SECRET is missing
